message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>A dynamic epidemic modeling, based on real time data, of COVID19 has been attempted for India and few selected Indian states. Various scenarios of intervention strategies to contain the spread of the disease are explored.</jats:p>
title: COVID19 epidemic modelling and the effect of public health interventions in India-SEIQHRF model

reference.article-title: Critical community size for COVID-19–a model based approach to provide a rationale behind the lockdown
Prediction of COVID-19 Disease Progression in India: Under the Effect of National Lockdown
